data.title: Galaxy Digital CEO predicts stablecoin rewards battle loss against banking lobby, compromise expected. Democrats committed to bill.
data.description: The CEO of Galaxy Digital Inc. (NASDAQ: GLXY), Mike Novogratz, expressed on Wednesday that the cryptocurrency sector may need to reach a compromise regarding the contentious stablecoin rewards provision in the market structure bill. During a conversation with Anthony Scaramucci, the founder of SkyBridge Capital, Novogratz mentioned the likelihood of the industry "losing that battle" against the powerful banking lobby. He anticipated that a compromise could be reached where stablecoin companies are permitted to offer reward points for usage, excluding balances. Novogratz also remarked that Democrats are dedicated to the cause. He stated that overall, the bill is deemed beneficial for the industry's progress. For further details, visit a reputable financial news website.

data.title: New Earth Resources supports US Proclamation to bolster critical minerals supply chains issued on Jan 14, 2026.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 22, 2026, New Earth Resources Corp. (CSE: EATH) expressed its approval of President Trump's U.S. Presidential Proclamation from January 14, 2026, related to imports of processed critical minerals and derivative products under Section 232 of the Trade Expansion Act of 1962.

data.title: Li-FT Power announces new financing with $10 million to support expansion efforts.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global carbon dioxide emissions reached a record high of 34 billion metric tons in 2020, despite a 6.4% decrease in emissions in the United States due to the COVID-19 pandemic. The report also reveals that China remains the largest emitter of carbon dioxide with 27% of the global total emissions, while the European Union saw a 10% decrease in emissions. These findings highlight the urgent need for countries to take action in reducing carbon emissions to combat climate change.

data.title: Logitech unveils Rally AI Cameras for large spaces, featuring new AI-powered video intelligence.
data.description: Logitech, a global tech company (SIX: LOGN) (NASDAQ: LOGI), has unveiled two new conference cameras, Rally AI Camera and Rally AI Camera Pro, designed for large spaces. Both cameras feature AI-powered video intelligence technology in a visually discreet design. The Rally AI Camera Pro is highlighted as Logitech's most advanced camera, while the Rally AI Camera seamlessly integrates into room aesthetics. These cameras offer enhanced intelligence and automation capabilities tailored for larger and intricate spaces, marking a significant development in Logitech's product offerings.

data.title: Starlight Investments tops out Spectra in Salford, UK, marking key milestone towards 393 rental homes completion.
data.description: A significant achievement has been reached in Salford, UK as Starlight Investments celebrates the topping out of Spectra, a towering 34-storey residential complex. This marks a crucial milestone in the construction of 393 premium rental homes in the area. The development is part of a larger project aimed at providing high-quality housing options in Salford. The completion of Spectra signifies substantial progress in the creation of much-needed accommodation, with the project's scale and impact on the local housing market being notable.

data.title: Microsoft partners with Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team for multiyear collaboration to integrate Microsoft technologies into race team operations.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Microsoft Corp. and the Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team have revealed a long-term partnership on Jan. 22, 2026. This collaboration aims to integrate Microsoft's technologies into the core of the race team operations. This strategic alliance signifies a significant move towards enhancing performance and efficiency within the team, emphasizing the importance of leveraging cutting-edge technology in the competitive realm of Formula 1. The partnership, spanning multiple years, is set to revolutionize the way the team functions, with Microsoft's innovative solutions playing a pivotal role in driving success on the racetrack.

data.title: Resolve M Therapeutics, specializing in pro-resolution therapy, has emerged from stealth in Cambridge, Mass., on Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: A novel platform has been created with the aim of triggering pro-resolution responses to rebalance immune functioning in inflammatory conditions, without causing general immune suppression. Located in Cambridge, Massachusetts, Resolve M Therapeutics, Inc. announced this development on January 22, 2026. The company is working towards establishing the first all-encompassing solution in the field of biotechnology.
